Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage of Red Faith]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a supposed entity or person associated with Redmoon Hall.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Sage of Red Faith is an ally of Redmoon Hall.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Sage of Red Faith provided a method for feeding the Blood Shadow.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Sage of Red Faith has techniques for raising Blood Shadows.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a Blood Sage who looks like a frog with red paint tracking down from his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith encourages the spreading of Blood Shadows on the wild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer took lessons from the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Sage of Red Faith claims to have been sponsored by a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Sage of Red Faith attempted to devise a method to fuse with his Blood Shadow instead of his own Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Sage of Red Faith gave Yan Shoumei special instructions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Sage of Red Faith will lead Calan's expedition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a pale human with bloody streaks down his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Sage of Red Faith questioned how Eithan advanced so quickly.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a character who cooperates with Reigan Shen.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Sage of Red Faith is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith is a character who uses cloud madra and shadow to avoid physical distractions in his laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith uses memory recording sessions to learn from Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith created a Blood Shadow and established a symbiotic relationship with it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith developed cycling patterns to feed his Blood Shadow dream aura and blood essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of Red Faith believes he failed to create a subordinate Blood Shadow because he created a perfect copy instead of an imperfect one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Sage of Red Faith carves scripts in rings to hide locations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Sage of Red Faith is the twin of Redmoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage of Red Faith hates Herald Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage of Red Faith uses blood aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage of Red Faith uses nine daggers in formation.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — The Sage of Red Faith might view the name Ghostwind Hall as mocking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Sage of Red Faith used a series of daggers in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Sage of Red Faith gifted a Divine Treasure to Calling Storms.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
